NexusAppSettings.NexusKeyExampleNote: The checked-in staging Nexus key material is an example only. Override it with secret configuration before using any shared, exposed, or production-like environment.
NexusAppSettings.NexusKeyFormatNote: Format is omitted intentionally. NexusKey defaults to ByteEncoding.Utf8, so this 32-character sample string is used as 32 raw UTF-8 bytes and is not hex-decoded.
NexusAppSettings.NexusKeyAlternativeFormatNote: Alternative NexusKey formats: Hex, Base64, or Base64UrlEncoded; decoded bytes must be exactly 32.

DrnAppFeatures.SeedKeyNote: This staging example uses the same SeedKey as Development for app security defaults. Staging still requires an explicit default NexusKey; SeedKey does not derive Nexus key material here.
DrnAppFeatures.SeedKey: Our true mentor in life is science! - Mustafa Kemal Atatürk (1924)
